content.en:
"Everyone, there are other Legendary Realm lords who deliberately framed me, my Blackwater Mountain Supreme Treasure was stolen, you continue to stop me, I and you really have no holy land to die!"

The Blackwater Lord said angrily.

"Kill the legendary lord of our True Saintless Land, and still be so arrogant?"

The True Spirit Lord said coldly.

Immediately, the Legendary Realm Lord of the True Saintless Land attacked even more vigorously.

Because they all knew that Ye Tian was afraid that he had succeeded, and he could make the Black Water Lord so angry, that proved that their plan was correct, and there were really treasures like three thousand iris in Heishui Mountain.

The other side.

Ye Tian fled, taking three thousand iris with him, constantly tearing the space, and soon escaped from this area.

And then.

Ye Tian returned to the True Void Holy Land, and a Legendary Realm Lord of the True Void Holy Land answered Ye Tian, and took Ye Tian into a Void River Boundary Array in the True Void Holy Land, and put three thousand iris in it~.

In this way, the Blackwater Lord didn't even want to find the three thousand kites.

Moreover, during the entire escape process, the Legendary Realm Lord erased traces, and the Blackwater Lord could not be traced.

Outside Blackwater Mountain.

The battle of the Legendary Realm Lords continued, and soon there were few Legendary Realm Lords coming, all of whom were friends of the Blackwater Lord.

In the end, the True Spirit Lord and the other Legendary Realm Lords retreated, but they asked for compensation, and although the Blackwater Lord was angry, he still gave it.

Blackwater Mountain, the interior of the nameless Black Mountain.

The Lord of Blackwater came back and saw the empty cultivation place, and the three thousand iris were gone.

Immediately, he spied into time and space and saw a familiar figure-Lord Qinghuan.

Then, he was dumbfounded, Lord Qinghuan actually controlled time, but he wanted to see Lord Qinghuan's past, but he couldn't see it.

Immediately, he tracked the escape route of the Qinghuan Lord, but soon the clue was broken, and the trace was erased by the Legendary Realm Lord.

He's untraceable.

"Damn, who the hell is it?"

He thinks that this Qinghuan Lord must be fake, and even more than the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, it is very likely to be a half-step Legendary Realm, and it is a half-step Legendary Realm Lord who has just controlled time and has not yet attacked the Legendary Realm Lord.

Definitely!

The Blackwater Lord kept searching, but to no avail.

In other words, the three thousand kites were really lost

"Mo Feng, is that you?"

The Lord of the Water said with a gloomy face.

If it was Mo Feng, he had to be careful, in case Mo Feng's strength was stronger than him in the future, he would definitely come to take revenge on him.

"The three thousand kites are still useful to me, although it is difficult to help me break through to the peak Legendary Realm lord realm, but at least it can improve my strength!"

The Blackwater Lord said helplessly and angrily.

But there was no way, he couldn't find the three thousand kites again, the enemy was ready, and it was impossible for him to find them.

There is no holy place.

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords have returned, and Ye Tian has already annihilated the copy body of the Qinghuan Lord, so that the clues have been completely cut off.

At this time, Ye Tian and many Legendary Realm Lords were all contemplating near the Three Thousand Kite Lin.

"What kind of treasure is this, it actually contains three thousand abilities, three thousand kites, and each scale contains a magical effect. However, one scale is only suitable for one person to attain enlightenment, and it is not possible for two people to attain enlightenment together. The True Spirit Lord said.

"These three thousand iris are enough for us to give birth to many Legendary Realm Lords in the True Saintless Land, but we must be careful, the half-step Legendary Realm Lords must also be reviewed, and we must have enough contributions and qualifications to the True Saintless Land before we can enter here to comprehend, and we must make a Dao Heart Oath not to leak the cut here, and restrain it a little. Lord Dragongu suggested.

"That's for sure, in addition, the three thousand iris were stolen by the Endless Lord, the Endless Lord can have the first cultivation authority, he can go to any of the three thousand iris scales for enlightenment, and the other Legendary Realm Lords must back down, no problem, right?" the True Spirit Lord proposed.

"No problem!"

One by one, the Lords of the Legendary Realm agreed.

Subsequently, one by one, the lords of the legendary realm began to go to the enlightenment, knowing the usefulness of each scale, so as to record it, and the later ones will know.

Ye Tian also went up to comprehend and test it.

"Enlightenment on this scale can increase understanding. "

"On this scale, you can understand time!"

"This scale can comprehend the space!"

"Cultivating on this scale can actually accelerate the cultivation of the legendary body. "

"Cultivating on this scale can accelerate the improvement of willpower!"

......

Ye Tian kept trying, and finally found a scale suitable for his current realm.

On this scale, Ye Tian found that he could actually increase the speed of his body by fusing the Will Rule Heaven and Earth, and he could increase the speed by about a hundred times, which was already terrifying!

Since Ye Tian could use the scales here at will, Ye Tian directly asked the three replica bodies to come here to cultivate.

One cultivates the power of will, one improves the body and merges with the rules of the will, and the other improves the comprehension, so as to comprehend the supreme technique of creating time.

As for the two scales of the time and space, they were rotated by the Legendary Realm Lord and the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lord.

.........

Of course, there are also some scales that can assist in contemplating space and time, but they are not focused on improvement, but only incidental effects, which are also very popular and almost all of them are occupied.

After another period of time, some half-step Legendary Realm lords were allowed to enter here to comprehend the Three Thousand Kite Lin.

Among them, there is the lord of Ummon.

"Oh my God, there is such a treasure!!"

Lord Umeng was shocked.

With such a treasure, I am afraid that his strength can be improved very quickly, and he has the opportunity to be promoted to the lord of the Legendary Realm!

Of course, it is not his turn to contemplate time and space yet, but he can contemplate other scales.

As the years passed, the strength of the half-step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Immortal Holy Land had greatly improved, and the strength of the Legendary Realm Lords had also improved.

And during this period of time, the True Saintless Land has also been making trouble with Heishui Mountain, this is a show, otherwise the True Saintless Land has no action, but is suspicious.

Therefore, it is necessary to find trouble, so that the Lord of Blackwater will not think that this matter has anything to do with the True No Holy Land, which is also one of the victims.

However, what the Blackwater Lord didn't expect was that the real master behind the scenes was the True Saintless Land.

Before you know it, tens of millions of eternal years have passed.

And the matter of the True No Holy Land and Heishui Mountain has also come to an end, although there is nothing to do, but the two forces are in an unfriendly state.

On this day, the good news came that another half-step Legendary Realm Lord of the True Void Holy Land had taken control of Time Nine.
